name: run_liana_cellphonedb
description: Infer cell-cell communication from a single-cell RNA-seq dataset using LIANA (LIgand-receptor ANalysis frAmework; Dimitrov et al., Nature Communications 2022) with its CellPhoneDB permutation-test method, returning the top ligand-receptor interactions between cell types. LIANA is the consensus framework that re-implements CellPhoneDB/CellChat/NATMI/Connectome/etc. over shared curated resources. Input is a server-accessible .h5ad of log1p-normalized expression with a cell-type label column in obs. Each interaction is scored by magnitude (lr_means) and specificity (cellphone_pvals).

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to an .h5ad AnnData of LOG1P-NORMALIZED expression.

cluster_key.description: obs column holding the cell-type / cluster labels to compute interactions between.

top_n.description: Number of top interactions to return, ranked by specificity then magnitude (default 50).

expr_prop.description: Minimum fraction of cells in a group expressing a gene for it to be considered (default 0.1).

interactions.description: Top ligand-receptor records (source, target, ligand_complex, receptor_complex, lr_means, cellphone_pvals).

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
